Pitch Us

We run a tight process with one investment per month on average. At a minimum, you can expect decisions in 3 weeks or less. Intro chat, diligence requests, diligence chat, partners chat, in-depth diligence, and offer.

What's it like to work with us?

Pitch Us

We run a tight process with one investment per month on average. At a minimum, you can expect decisions in 3 weeks or less. Intro chat, diligence requests, diligence chat, partners chat, in-depth diligence, and offer.

What's it like to work with us?
